emails.subject: Re: London Research Group
emails.body: Richard, Please, let me know what the timetable is. I would like to talk to Anjam a few days before to break the news to him. I hope I can save him for the company and offer him a position in Houston. We desperately need skills he has. Vince Richard Lewis 07/27/2000 02:20 AM

emails.subject: Re: London Research Group
emails.body: I'd do it as soon as possible. Your call on exactly when. Regards Richard Vince J Kaminski 27/07/2000 17:11
